name: accordion
title: Accordion
description: Plex UI Accordion — vertically stacked collapsible panels built on Radix Accordion. Compound API: Accordion.Item, Accordion.Trigger, Accordion.Content. Supports single/multiple expansion, per-item disabled, and controlled value.

files.content:
export { Accordion } from '@plexui/ui/components/Accordion';
export type { AccordionProps, AccordionItemProps, AccordionTriggerProps, AccordionContentProps } from '@plexui/ui/components/Accordion';

docs: Import as `import { Accordion } from '@/components/ui/accordion'`. See https://plexui.dev/docs/components/accordion for full prop reference.
